known_issues.title: EcoBoost intake timing chain / internal water pump failure
known_issues.description: On 2.7L and 3.5L EcoBoost engines, the water pump is driven off the timing chain inside the engine, and a failing pump or stretched chain can dump coolant into the oil, requiring a full timing cover teardown.
known_issues.symptoms: A milky or foamy tint on the oil dipstick, low coolant level with no visible external leak, and sometimes a rattling timing chain noise on cold start.
known_issues.recommendation: Pull the oil dipstick and check for a milky or foamy tint before buying, and ask for recent oil analysis on EcoBoost-equipped trucks.

known_issues.title: Aluminum body panel repair cost
known_issues.description: The aluminum body and bed are lighter and more corrosion resistant, but even minor collision damage often requires specialized aluminum repair equipment, driving up body shop costs.
known_issues.symptoms: Visible dents, creases, or mismatched paint on body panels, and unusually high repair estimates for what looks like minor damage.
known_issues.recommendation: Get a body shop quote before buying if there is any visible panel damage or prior repair work.

known_issues.title: 10-speed transmission shudder and harsh shifts
known_issues.description: Trucks built from 2017 onward with the 10-speed automatic can develop a shudder in 3rd-4th gear or harsh 1-2 shifts as the fluid and clutch packs age.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder or vibration felt during 3rd-4th gear cruising, or an abrupt clunk when shifting from 1st to 2nd gear from a stop.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive through a full range of city speeds and feel for shudder or hard shifts, especially from a stop.

known_issues.title: Power door lock actuator and door handle failures
known_issues.description: Door lock actuators and exterior handle mechanisms can wear out or freeze, especially on trucks that see winter road salt.
known_issues.symptoms: A door that won't lock or unlock with the key fob, a handle that feels loose or sticks, or a clicking noise from inside the door when locking.
known_issues.recommendation: Cycle every door lock and handle, including the tailgate, before buying.

generations.label: 4th Gen
generations.common_competitors: Honda CR-V, Toyota RAV4, Nissan Rogue

known_issues.title: 1.5L EcoBoost engine fire recall
known_issues.description: Certain 2020 model-year Escapes with the 1.5L EcoBoost engine were subject to a Ford recall for cracked engine blocks that could leak oil onto hot components and ignite.
known_issues.symptoms: A burning oil smell, visible smoke from under the hood, or an illuminated check engine light alongside unusual oil consumption.
known_issues.recommendation: Confirm the recall was completed by checking the VIN on Ford's recall lookup before buying a 2020 model.

known_issues.title: 8-speed automatic transmission shudder
known_issues.description: Some early-production units exhibit a shudder or flare during light-throttle upshifts, most noticeable around town.
known_issues.symptoms: A shudder or momentary flare in engine RPM during gentle upshifts at low speed, most noticeable pulling away from a stop.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive in stop-and-go traffic and feel for hesitation or shudder during gentle acceleration.

known_issues.title: Power liftgate malfunction
known_issues.description: The power liftgate motor or latch can fail to open or close fully, sometimes triggering a fault warning.
known_issues.symptoms: The liftgate stalling partway open or closed, failing to respond to the fob button, or a liftgate fault message on the dash.
known_issues.recommendation: Operate the power liftgate several times with the key fob and interior button to confirm smooth operation.

known_issues.title: SYNC infotainment glitches
known_issues.description: The SYNC 3 touchscreen can freeze, lose Bluetooth pairing, or reboot unexpectedly, usually resolved with a software update.
known_issues.symptoms: The touchscreen freezing mid-use, Bluetooth audio cutting out, or the whole infotainment system rebooting on its own.
known_issues.recommendation: Pair a phone and cycle through navigation and audio screens to confirm responsiveness.
